field.label: Mid-Upper Arm Circumference (MUAC) in mm
field.hint: Measure at the midpoint of the left upper arm. Range: 50mm - 250mm.

field.label: Bilateral Pitting Oedema Present? (yes/no)
field.hint: Check both feet for fluid retention retention retention. Type 'yes' or 'no'.

workflow.outcome: CRITICAL ALERT: Severe Acute Malnutrition verified. Immediately provision a therapeutic toolkit (RUTF), check for medical complications, and refer to the nearest stabilization center.
MODERATE INTERVENTION: Moderate Acute Malnutrition identified. Register the household for targeted supplementary feeding programs and schedule a health worker tracking check in 7 days.
NORMAL: Child's metrics fall within a standard healthy development curve. Provide standard nutritional counseling to the caregiver and re-screen at the next community drive.
SYSTEM FALLBACK: The metrics provided require manual clinical evaluation. Please re-measure manually and consult the supervising program head.
